name: retrieve_current_user_dnd_status
description: Retrieves a slack user's current do not disturb (dnd) status to determine their availability before interaction; any specified user id must be a valid slack user id.

user.description:
User ID to fetch DND status for. If not provided, fetches the DND status for the authenticated user.
Examples:
  "U012ABCDEF"
  "W12345678"

arguments.description: Request schema for retrieving the current Do Not Disturb (DND) status of a user.
